confidence_rationale: Video classification is unambiguous: this is an instructional/equipment demonstration video with narration, product branding ('Laparo Aspire'), and systematic equipment breakdown. No trainee or expert performs the actual pattern cut task. Scoring is not appropriate.
cannot_determine: Actual performance metrics (completion time, cutting accuracy, deviations)
video_summary: This is an instructional video demonstrating the FLS Precision Cutting (Pattern Cut) task trainer setup, equipment identification, and trainer preparation. The video shows the Laparo Aspire trainer, identifies the Maryland dissector and endoscopic scissors, demonstrates the jumbo clip mounting, and displays the prepared gauze with the pre-marked circular cutting target. No actual task performance is shown; therefore, no FLS scoring is applicable. This video is intended for educational purposes to teach trainee setup and equipment familiarization.

demonstrated_techniques: Proper trainer assembly and equipment placement
Correct identification of Maryland dissector instrument
Proper gauze mounting and alligator clip positioning
Recognition of pre-marked circular cutting target
common_errors_addressed: Video implicitly demonstrates correct trainer setup, which prevents common errors such as improper clip placement or incorrect instrument selection
teaching_content.instructional_focus: Equipment familiarization and trainer preparation for pattern cut task

improvement_suggestions: This is instructional content; performance coaching is not applicable
